description: Infernal spellbinder who turns ritual flame into fast, escalating battlefield pressure.

presentation.headline: Cinder spellbinder who keeps ritual fire moving through the hunt.
presentation.fantasy_hook: A crooked witch hood, ember-red braid, floating candles, and a sigil wand make her flamecraft instantly readable.
presentation.identity_summary: The Cinder Witch blends hellfire relics with ritual tools. Each takedown deepens her trance, briefly accelerating attacks and strengthening burn pressure.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant attack speed and burn damage, stacking up to three times while the ritual flame stays fed.
tradeoffs: Needs kills to maintain the trance
